maintenanceMode.recheckNotice: This page rechecks automatically every 30 seconds, or you can <internalLink to="/login">check the status now</internalLink>.

additionalInfo.body:
Enabling autosharing for a member will ensure that all their current and future documents and notebooks will be shared automatically with the "read" permission with this group.

Edit permission can be granted or items can be unshared through the "Manage Shared Documents" section as usual.

This setting is revertible and you can always manually change the autoshare status of any non-PI member in your lab group.
additionalInfo.title: Additional Information

disableGroup.text: Disabling group-wide autosharing will unshare all work shared by non-PI members in the {groupDisplayName} group. Once disabled, new non-PI members will no longer have autosharing automatically enabled on joining.
disableGroup.title: Disable group-wide autosharing

autosharing.disableStarted: Reverting autoshare for {group} started successfully. You will receive a notification once it is complete.
autosharing.disableUserText:
Disabling autosharing will unshare all work for user {username} from group {group}.

Individual documents and notebooks can still be shared as usual.
autosharing.enableAsyncSuccess: Autoshare for {group} was enabled successfully. You will receive a notification once it is complete.

enableGroup.text: Enabling group-wide autosharing will enable autosharing for all non-PI members in the {groupDisplayName} group. Once enabled, new non-PI members will have autosharing automatically enabled on joining.
enableGroup.title: Enable group-wide autosharing

autosharing.enableUserText:
Autosharing work will ensure that all current and future documents and notebooks for user {username} will be shared with group {group} with the READ permission.

The EDIT permission can be granted or items can be unshared from the "Manage Shared Documents" section as usual.

Please enter a name for the folder that the work will be shared into.
autosharing.genericError: Something went wrong. Please, contact support if the issue persists.
autosharing.onlyLabGroups: Autosharing is only possible for LabGroups
autosharing.settingInProgress: Please allow some time for the setting to take into-effect. You will receive a notification when it is complete

allow.citation: Whetzel PL, Noy NF, Shah NH, Alexander PR, Nyulas C, Tudorache T, Musen MA. BioPortal: enhanced functionality via new Web services from the National Center for Biomedical Ontology to access and use ontologies in software applications. Nucleic Acids Res. 2011 Jul;39(Web Server issue):W541-5. Epub 2011 Jun 14.
allow.text: Allowing BioPortal Ontologies for tags will query data from the <externalLink href="https://bioportal.bioontology.org/ontologies"> BioPortal Ontologies Portal</externalLink> and use the values to generate tag suggestions
allow.title: Allow BioPortal Ontologies to be used for tag suggestions

disallow.text: Disallowing use of BioPortal Ontologies will restrict tag suggestions: values from the <externalLink href="https://bioportal.bioontology.org/ontologies"> BioPortal Ontologies Portal</externalLink> will no longer be suggested.
disallow.title: Disallow BioPortal Ontologies to be used for tag suggestions

dialog.addError: Unable to add/invite the user(s). Please check browser console for error details, and contact support if the problem persists.

editBar.errorMessage: Your request failed: {error}. Please contact support if this problem persists.
editBar.hideGroup: Hide the group from public listings
editBar.noProfile: There is no profile information for this group.
editBar.piCanEdit: PI can edit all work in this lab group.
editBar.placeholder: Please enter a short description of this group...

manager.contactAdmin: Please contact your system administrator to enable this feature

enforce.text: Enforcing ontologies for tags will result in all new tags coming from autopopulated values read from ontology files. These ontology files must be shared with a Group and any user creating new tags must be a member of that Group. Collaboration Groups can be used for this purpose. Tags can not be created from free text and will not autopopulate from existing tags.
enforce.title: Enforce ontologies for tags

unenforce.text: Un-enforcing use of ontologies for tags will result in group members being able to enter free text when creating new tags. They may also use values autopopulated from ontology files. These ontology files may be their own, or may be files shared with them. They may also use values autopopulated from existing tags.
unenforce.title: Un-enforce use of ontologies for tags

disable.text: Disabling group-wide publication will prevent non PI members of the {groupDisplayName} group publishing their own documents. They may still unpublish previously published documents.
disable.title: Disable group-wide publication

enable.text: Enabling group-wide publication will allow non-PI members in the {groupDisplayName} group to publish and unpublish their own documents. PIs can also unpublish these documents.
enable.title: Enable group publication

disable.text: Disabling group-wide SEO of public documents will prevent non PI members of the {groupDisplayName} group from allowing SEO bots to index their documents. Their published documents will not appear on the 'Published' page visible to the public.
disable.title: Disable group-wide SEO of public documents

enable.text: Enabling group-wide SEO for published documents will allow non-PI members in the {groupDisplayName} group to choose to have their documents indexed by SEO bots. These documents will also be shown on the 'Published' page visible to the public.
enable.title: Enable group-wide SEO for published documents
